Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a virtual machine

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Virtual machine {object.name} is terminated on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is stopping virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is starting virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to stop virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to restart virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is stopping virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} restarted virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} stopped virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to stop virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} stopped virtual machine group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is restarting virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to start virtual machine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
